lanes.blocked_reason: missing required artifact: capture-manifest.json; missing required artifact: observer-capture.json; missing required artifact: evidence-bundle.json; evidence-bundle.json statement failed validation; evidence ingest decision is blocked
lanes.objective: Run one local allowlisted shell lane and fan in evidence-next.

leader_objective: Demonstrate a minimal fail-closed local Depone team loop.
stop_rule: team-local stops on first blocked lane
